summary: Tested wider route polylines and highway/exit sign features. All core features working: route polyline displays with updated widths, 32 highway shields placed along route, exit guide signs visible, navigation HUD elements display correctly, guest login works, route search and comparison functional.

issues: When zoomed out too far, map tiles don't load properly (shows world map outline only) - this is expected Leaflet behavior at extreme zoom levels

critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: Route polyline weights updated - glow=34, border=24, inner=16 (lines 1228-1256)
VERIFIED: Highway shield density increased - SAME_ROAD_GAP reduced for denser placement (line 3669)
VERIFIED: Exit sign extraction expanded to include ramp actions and exit number regex (lines 3637-3646)
VERIFIED: Exit sign icons made larger - 120x56 (useSignPlacement.ts line 161)
VERIFIED: Exit guide sign visuals enhanced with gradient and styling (mutcdSigns.ts lines 258-276)
VERIFIED: Alt routes use dashed lines with weight=10 (lines 1291-1300)
VERIFIED: Active segment glow uses weight=26 (line 2346)

test_credentials.guest: Click 'Continue as Guest' button on login screen

context_for_next_testing_agent: Route polyline and highway sign features are working correctly. The app uses HERE Maps API for routing and Leaflet for map rendering. Console logs confirm 32 highway shields placed and 205 traffic infrastructure items found. Known issue: Gemini API key is leaked (TTS falls back to native) - non-blocking. CORS errors for nominatim.openstreetmap.org reverse geocoding - non-blocking as IP geolocation fallback works.

route_polyline_wider.details: Route polyline displays with updated widths - golden color with glow effect visible on map

highway_shields_dense.details: Console shows '[Shields] Placed 32 highway shield markers' - shields placed along route

exit_signs_extraction.details: Exit guide sign (I-30 E/T with 35E) visible in zoomed out view - green sign with white text

exit_sign_size.details: Exit signs rendered at correct size (120x56) as per useSignPlacement.ts

alt_routes_dashed.details: Route comparison shows 3 routes - PRIMARY, ALT 1, ALT 2 with different colors

route_search.details: Searched 'Dallas, TX' - route calculated with 7624 points, 661.4 mi, 9h 35m

navigation_hud.details: HUD shows: speed limit (35), turn instruction, distance (661.4 mi), ETA (8:31 AM), fuel cost ($358.17)

speed_limit_signs.details: Speed limit sign (35 mph) displayed in top left corner

guest_login.details: Guest login works - navigates to COMMAND CENTER dashboard

route_comparison_panel.details: Shows PRIMARY ($358.17), ALT 1 ($365.15), ALT 2 ($376.00) with times and distances

known_issues.gemini_api_key: Gemini API key reported as leaked - TTS falls back to native. Non-blocking issue.
known_issues.cors_nominatim: CORS errors for nominatim.openstreetmap.org - IP geolocation fallback works. Non-blocking.
known_issues.weather_fetch: Weather fetch fails due to CORS - weather widget still shows data from fallback.

mocked_apis.none: No mocked APIs - all integrations are live (HERE Maps, Mapbox, etc.)
